steps.name: Sign in by email and password
Add products to cart: [Long Maxi Tulle Fancy Dress Up Outfits -Pink, Green Side Placket Detail T-Shirt, Rose Pink Embroidered Maxi Dress, Premium Polo T-Shirts, Sleeveless Dress]
Add product [Long Maxi Tulle Fancy Dress Up Outfits -Pink] and close success notification
Add product to cart from [Filtered products list]: Long Maxi Tulle Fancy Dress Up Outfits -Pink

parameters.name: productTitle
parameters.value: Long Maxi Tulle Fancy Dress Up Outfits -Pink

steps.name: Check notification has success added product to cart message

parameters.name: productTitle
parameters.value: Long Maxi Tulle Fancy Dress Up Outfits -Pink

steps.name: Add product [Green Side Placket Detail T-Shirt] and close success notification
Add product to cart from [Filtered products list]: Green Side Placket Detail T-Shirt
Check notification has success added product to cart message
Add product [Rose Pink Embroidered Maxi Dress] and close success notification
Add product to cart from [Filtered products list]: Rose Pink Embroidered Maxi Dress
Check notification has success added product to cart message
Add product [Premium Polo T-Shirts] and close success notification
Add product to cart from [Filtered products list]: Premium Polo T-Shirts
Check notification has success added product to cart message
Add product [Sleeveless Dress] and close success notification
Add product to cart from [Filtered products list]: Sleeveless Dress
Check notification has success added product to cart message

parameters.name: productsTitles
parameters.value: [Long Maxi Tulle Fancy Dress Up Outfits -Pink, Green Side Placket Detail T-Shirt, Rose Pink Embroidered Maxi Dress, Premium Polo T-Shirts, Sleeveless Dress]

parameters.name: comment
parameters.value: Aut eveniet saepe ipsa reprehenderit explicabo fugit ducimus. Dicta hic quod. Nihil facere ipsa incidunt inventore itaque facilis numquam. Aperiam aliquid numquam nihil.

steps.name: Fill [Name on Card] input: Mathew Spencer Jr.
Click on [Pay and Confirm Order] button
Check order placed message is visible
